λ_A.description: Constant failure rate of transmitter A when transmitter B is operating.

λ_B.description: Constant failure rate of transmitter B when transmitter A is operating.

λ_A'.description: Constant failure rate of transmitter A when transmitter B has failed.

λ_B'.description: Constant failure rate of transmitter B when transmitter A has failed.

λ_P.description: Constant failure rate of the power supply.

λ_C.description: Constant failure rate of fault coverage (undetected fault).

t.description: Time variable over which the reliability function R(t) is evaluated.
